examples: At the same time, today, the actions, and inaction, of human beings imperil not only life on the planet, but the very life of the planet.
Melting ice can help unlock ancient secrets, but warming temperatures could imperil many more historic sites.
Office etiquette and rules might also imperil new employees who haven't yet made the switch from campus mind to office mind.
It would imperil the security of a key regional ally and vital strategic asset.
If we don't tend to each part of this system, we imperil the whole structure.
